title: Mikhaylovka Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Mikhaylovka with a Z-Score of +3.80. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Mikhaylovka has led to a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 12.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 23%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed of 24.7 km/h may provide some relief, but the overall conditions remain critical.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this heat wave.
